zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Hankford於大約1397年7月21日出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Richard Hankford28歲，母親Thomasine Stapledon22歲。他於大約1420年與Elizabeth FitzWarren結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1431年2月8日在英國享年33歲，埋葬在英國戴文蒙可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Hankford于大约1397年7月21日出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Richard Hankford28岁，母亲Thomasine Stapledon22岁。他于大约1420年与Elizabeth FitzWarren结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1431年2月8日在英国享年33岁，埋葬在英国戴文蒙可利。

nameMeanings.name: Hankford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Hackforth (North Yorkshire) or Hackford (Norfolk). The former is named with Old English haca ‘hook’ + ford ‘ford’, meaning ‘ford at the bend’. The latter likely has the same etymology, or may contain the Old English personal name Haca.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Hankford was born about 21 July 1397, in Devon, England, his father, Richard Hankford, was 28 and his mother, Thomasine Stapledon, was 22. He married Elizabeth FitzWarren about 1420. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 8 February 1431, in England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Monkleigh, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Hankford est né environ 21 juillet 1397, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hankford, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Stapledon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzWarren environ 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1431, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterré à Monkleigh, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Hankford um 21. Juli 1397 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hankford 28 und seine Mutter Thomasine Stapledon 22. Er hat um 1420 Elizabeth FitzWarren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Februar 1431 im Alter von 33 Jahren in England und wurde in Monkleigh, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hankford è nato il circa 21 luglio 1397 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Richard Hankford, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Thomasine Stapledon, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzWarren circa 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 8 febbraio 1431, nel England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolto a Monkleigh, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hankfordが約1397年7月21日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Richard Hankfordは28歳，母Thomasine Stapledonは22歳であった。約1420年にElizabeth FitzWarrenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年2月8日にイギリスで33歳で死去し，イギリスデボンモンクレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Hankford(이)가 대략 1397년 7월 21일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hankford(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Thomasine Stapledon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 Elizabeth FitzWarren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년 2월 8일 영국에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 몬클리에 묻혔다.

pt.about 21 July 1397–8 February 1431: aproximadamente 21 de julho de 1397–8 de fevereiro de 1431
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Hankford nasceu aproximadamente 21 de julho de 1397, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hankford, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Stapledon, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzWarren aproximadamente 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1431, em Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultado em Monkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Hankford родился около 21 июля 1397 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hankford было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Stapledon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzWarren около 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 8 февраля 1431 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 33 лет и был похоронен в местности монклиг, девон, Англия.

sm.about 21 July 1397–8 February 1431: e tusa o le 21 Iulai 1397–8 Fepuari 1431

es.about 21 July 1397–8 February 1431: aproximadamente 21 de julio de 1397–8 de febrero de 1431
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Hankford nació aproximadamente 21 de julio de 1397, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hankford, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Thomasine Stapledon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzWarren aproximadamente 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1431, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultado en Monkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra.
